homepage.heroSubline: Durable asphalt solutions for Dallas-Fort Worth homes and businesses. Get a free, no-obligation quote today.
aboutText: American Asphalt started with a simple goal: to provide the highest quality asphalt paving services to the Dallas community. Founded by a team of seasoned paving professionals, we understood the unique challenges our Texas climate presents to asphalt driveways. From scorching summers to the occasional ice storm, we've seen it all and know how to build driveways that last.

Our approach is straightforward: we use premium materials, employ skilled craftsmen, and prioritize clear communication with our clients. We believe in doing the job right the first time, ensuring a smooth, durable surface that enhances your property's value and curb appeal. We're not just paving driveways; we're building relationships based on trust and reliability.

We are proud to be a local Dallas business, committed to supporting our community. We source our materials locally whenever possible, contributing to the local economy and reducing our environmental impact. We also actively participate in local initiatives, ensuring that we give back to the community that has supported us for over a decade.

services.name: Asphalt Driveway Paving
services.shortDescription: New asphalt driveway installation for lasting curb appeal.
services.description:
From initial site preparation to the final compaction, American Asphalt provides comprehensive asphalt driveway paving services. We begin with a thorough assessment of your property, taking into account factors like soil composition, drainage patterns, and existing landscaping. Our experienced team then prepares the base, ensuring a solid foundation for your new driveway. We use only premium-grade asphalt, specifically formulated to withstand the extreme temperatures and weather conditions of the Dallas area. 

Our paving process includes precise grading and leveling to ensure proper drainage and prevent water damage. We then compact the asphalt using heavy-duty machinery, creating a smooth, durable surface that will stand the test of time. We also offer a variety of finishing options, including sealcoating and decorative edging, to enhance the appearance and longevity of your new driveway. Whether you're building a new home or replacing an existing driveway, American Asphalt delivers superior results that exceed expectations.

We understand that a new driveway is a significant investment, and we are committed to providing exceptional value and customer satisfaction. Our team is fully licensed and insured, and we stand behind our work with a comprehensive warranty. Contact us today for a free estimate and let us transform your property with a beautiful, durable asphalt driveway.

faq.question: How long does asphalt driveway paving last?
faq.answer: With proper installation and maintenance, an asphalt driveway can last 15-20 years in the Dallas climate. Factors like traffic volume, weather exposure, and maintenance practices can affect its lifespan.

faq.question: What is the best time of year for asphalt paving in Dallas?
faq.answer: The ideal time for asphalt paving in Dallas is typically during the spring or fall when temperatures are moderate and there is less chance of extreme heat or cold affecting the asphalt's curing process.

faq.question: How much does asphalt driveway paving cost?
faq.answer: The cost of asphalt driveway paving varies depending on the size of the driveway, the thickness of the asphalt, and any additional site preparation required. Contact us for a free, no-obligation quote.

services.name: Asphalt Driveway Repair
services.shortDescription: Expert asphalt repair services to fix cracks, potholes, and damage.
services.description:
Don't let cracks and potholes ruin your driveway! American Asphalt specializes in asphalt driveway repair, providing cost-effective solutions to restore the integrity and appearance of your paved surfaces. Our experienced team can handle a wide range of repairs, from filling minor cracks to patching large potholes. We use hot-mix asphalt, the same material used in new driveway installations, to ensure a durable and seamless repair.

We understand that timely repairs are essential to prevent further damage and extend the life of your driveway. Water seeping into cracks can freeze and expand during the winter months, causing the asphalt to crumble and deteriorate. By addressing these issues promptly, you can avoid costly replacements down the road. Our repair process involves cleaning and preparing the damaged area, applying a tack coat to promote adhesion, and then filling the crack or pothole with hot-mix asphalt. We compact the asphalt to create a smooth, even surface that blends seamlessly with the existing driveway.

Whether you have a few minor cracks or a more significant area of damage, American Asphalt has the expertise and equipment to get the job done right. We offer free estimates and stand behind our work with a satisfaction guarantee. Protect your investment and restore your driveway to its former glory with our professional asphalt repair services.
process: Step 2: Cleaning and Preparation of Damaged Areas

faq.question: How soon should I repair cracks in my asphalt driveway?
faq.answer: It's best to repair cracks as soon as you notice them to prevent water from seeping in and causing further damage. Small cracks can quickly turn into larger problems if left unattended.

faq.question: What causes potholes in asphalt driveways?
faq.answer: Potholes are typically caused by water penetration, freeze-thaw cycles, and heavy traffic. When water seeps into cracks and freezes, it expands, causing the asphalt to break apart and form potholes.

faq.question: Is asphalt repair a DIY project?
faq.answer: While some minor cracks can be repaired with DIY kits, it's generally best to hire a professional for asphalt repair, especially for larger cracks and potholes. Professionals have the experience, equipment, and materials to ensure a durable and long-lasting repair.

services.name: Asphalt Sealcoating
services.shortDescription: Protect your driveway with professional asphalt sealcoating services.
services.description:
Extend the life of your asphalt driveway with American Asphalt's professional sealcoating services. Sealcoating is a protective layer applied to the surface of your asphalt driveway, shielding it from the damaging effects of weather, traffic, and chemicals. In the Dallas heat, the sun's UV rays can dry out the oils in asphalt, causing it to become brittle and crack. Sealcoating acts as a barrier, preventing this oxidation and keeping your asphalt flexible and durable.

Our sealcoating process involves thoroughly cleaning the driveway surface, filling any minor cracks, and then applying a high-quality sealant. We use only premium sealants that are specifically formulated to withstand the harsh Texas climate. Our sealcoating not only protects your driveway but also enhances its appearance, giving it a fresh, black look. Sealcoating also makes your driveway easier to clean and maintain, as it creates a smooth, non-porous surface that resists stains and spills.

Sealcoating is a cost-effective way to protect your investment and extend the life of your asphalt driveway. We recommend sealcoating every 2-3 years to maintain optimal protection. American Asphalt offers free estimates and stands behind our work with a satisfaction guarantee. Protect your driveway from the elements and keep it looking its best with our professional sealcoating services.

faq.question: How often should I sealcoat my asphalt driveway?
faq.answer: We recommend sealcoating your asphalt driveway every 2-3 years to maintain optimal protection.

faq.question: How long does sealcoating take to dry?
faq.answer: Sealcoating typically takes 24-48 hours to dry completely, depending on weather conditions. We recommend avoiding driving or walking on the sealed surface during this time.

faq.question: Can I sealcoat my driveway myself?
faq.answer: While DIY sealcoating kits are available, it's generally best to hire a professional for sealcoating. Professionals have the experience, equipment, and materials to ensure a proper application and long-lasting results.

services.name: Driveway Extensions
services.shortDescription: Expand your parking space with professional driveway extensions.
services.description:
Need more parking space? American Asphalt offers driveway extension services to expand your existing driveway and create additional parking for your vehicles. Whether you have a growing family or frequently entertain guests, a driveway extension can provide the extra space you need. We can extend your driveway in a variety of configurations, from simple widening to creating additional parking pads. 

Our driveway extension process begins with a thorough assessment of your property and your specific needs. We take into account factors like drainage, landscaping, and local zoning regulations. We then prepare the site, ensuring a solid foundation for the new asphalt. We use the same high-quality asphalt and paving techniques as we do for new driveway installations, ensuring a seamless and durable extension that blends seamlessly with your existing driveway.

American Asphalt is committed to providing exceptional customer service and quality workmanship. We offer free estimates and stand behind our work with a satisfaction guarantee. Expand your parking space and enhance the value of your property with our professional driveway extension services.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for a driveway extension?
faq.answer: Depending on the size and location of your driveway extension, you may need a permit from the city of Dallas or your local municipality. We can help you determine if a permit is required and assist with the application process.

faq.question: How long does it take to extend a driveway?
faq.answer: The time it takes to extend a driveway depends on the size and complexity of the project. Most driveway extensions can be completed in 1-3 days.

faq.question: Can you match the existing asphalt on my driveway?
faq.answer: Yes, we can match the existing asphalt on your driveway as closely as possible to ensure a seamless and consistent look.

services.name: Asphalt Resurfacing
services.shortDescription: Give your worn driveway a fresh look with asphalt resurfacing.
services.description:
Is your driveway showing its age? American Asphalt offers asphalt resurfacing services to give your worn driveway a fresh, new look without the expense of a complete replacement. Asphalt resurfacing involves applying a new layer of asphalt over your existing driveway, creating a smooth, even surface that enhances your property's curb appeal. 

Our resurfacing process begins with a thorough inspection of your existing driveway. We identify and repair any major cracks or potholes before applying the new layer of asphalt. We then apply a tack coat to promote adhesion and pave a new layer of hot-mix asphalt over the existing surface. We compact the asphalt to create a smooth, durable finish that will last for years to come. Asphalt resurfacing is a cost-effective alternative to complete driveway replacement, and it can significantly improve the appearance and value of your property.

American Asphalt is committed to providing exceptional customer service and quality workmanship. We offer free estimates and stand behind our work with a satisfaction guarantee. Give your driveway a facelift with our professional asphalt resurfacing services.

faq.question: When is asphalt resurfacing a good option?
faq.answer: Asphalt resurfacing is a good option when your driveway has minor cracks, potholes, and surface imperfections, but the base is still structurally sound. If your driveway has major structural damage, complete replacement may be necessary.

faq.question: How long does asphalt resurfacing last?
faq.answer: Asphalt resurfacing can last 8-12 years, depending on traffic volume, weather conditions, and maintenance practices.

faq.question: How is resurfacing different from a new driveway?
faq.answer: Resurfacing involves paving a new layer over the existing asphalt. A new driveway involves removing the old asphalt, preparing the base, and paving a completely new driveway structure.

services.name: Custom Paving Solutions
services.shortDescription: Tailored paving for unique projects: pathways, patios, and more.
services.description:
Beyond driveways, American Asphalt provides custom paving solutions for a variety of projects. Whether you need a paved pathway, a patio, or a custom parking area, our experienced team can deliver exceptional results. We work closely with you to understand your specific needs and design a paving solution that meets your unique requirements. 

Our custom paving services include site preparation, grading, paving, and finishing. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure a durable and aesthetically pleasing surface. We can also incorporate decorative elements, such as colored asphalt or stamped patterns, to create a unique and personalized look. American Asphalt is committed to providing exceptional customer service and quality workmanship. We offer free estimates and stand behind our work with a satisfaction guarantee. Let us help you create a beautiful and functional outdoor space with our custom paving solutions.

faq.question: Can you pave around trees and landscaping?
faq.answer: Yes, we can carefully pave around trees and landscaping to minimize disruption and maintain the natural beauty of your property. We can also install tree rings and other features to protect your trees.

faq.question: What types of decorative asphalt options are available?
faq.answer: We offer a variety of decorative asphalt options, including colored asphalt, stamped patterns, and exposed aggregate finishes. We can help you choose the right option to complement your property's style.

faq.question: Do you offer paving for commercial properties?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer paving services for both residential and commercial properties. We can handle projects of any size and complexity.

reviews.name: Robert K.
reviews.text: American Asphalt did an outstanding job on my new driveway. From the initial consultation to the final cleanup, they were professional, efficient, and courteous. The crew was skilled and meticulous, and the finished product looks fantastic. I highly recommend them!

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: I had several large potholes in my driveway, and American Asphalt fixed them quickly and effectively. The repairs are holding up well, and I'm very pleased with the results. The price was fair, and the service was excellent.

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.text: American Asphalt sealcoated my driveway, and it looks brand new! The sealant was applied evenly and professionally, and it's already protecting my driveway from the Texas sun. I would definitely use them again.

reviews.name: Jennifer M.
reviews.text: We needed to extend our driveway to accommodate our growing family, and American Asphalt did a fantastic job. They matched the existing asphalt perfectly, and the extension looks like it was always there. Great communication and a smooth process!

reviews.name: Michael B.
reviews.text: My driveway was cracked and faded, and American Asphalt resurfaced it beautifully. It looks so much better, and I'm confident it will last for many years to come. The crew was professional and efficient.

reviews.name: Susan H.
reviews.text: After getting several quotes, we chose American Asphalt for our new driveway. Best decision! They were upfront about costs and timeline, and the team worked hard. The end result is a beautiful, smooth driveway that has really improved the look of our home.
